parameters.query:
SELECT u.id AS user_id, e.id AS enrolment_id,
       COALESCE(e.current_module_id, m_first.id) AS current_module_id,
       m.title AS module_title, m.content AS module_content,
       m.position AS module_position,
       c.title AS course_title, c.id AS course_id,
       (
         SELECT COUNT(*) FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id
       ) AS total_modules,
       (
         SELECT COUNT(*) FROM progress p2
         JOIN modules m2 ON m2.id = p2.module_id
         WHERE p2.user_id = u.id AND m2.course_id = c.id
       ) AS completed_modules
FROM users u
JOIN enrolments e ON e.user_id = u.id
JOIN courses c ON c.id = e.course_id
LEFT JOIN modules m ON m.id = e.current_module_id
LEFT JOIN LATERAL (
  SELECT id FROM modules WHERE course_id = c.id ORDER BY position ASC LIMIT 1
) m_first ON true
WHERE u.slack_user_id = '{{ $json.user_id }}'
  AND e.completed_at IS NULL
ORDER BY e.enrolled_at DESC
LIMIT 1;

body.text: You're not enrolled in any course yet. Use `/enroll <course-code>` to get started!

options.systemMessage: You are a warm, knowledgeable corporate trainer. Make learning feel achievable and relevant.

elements.text: {{ $('Get User Enrolment & Module').item.json.course_title }} · Module {{ $('Get User Enrolment & Module').item.json.module_position + 1 }}/{{ $('Get User Enrolment & Module').item.json.total_modules }} · {{ $('Get User Enrolment & Module').item.json.completed_modules }} completed

text.text: When you've completed the mission, use `/submit <your answer>` to continue.
